title: Social Welfare (Reciprocity Agreements, and New Zealand Artificial Limb Service) Act 1990
description: New Zealand legislation (repealed 2018) that established reciprocity agreements with other countries for social welfare benefits, veterans' pensions, and superannuation portability, and governed the New Zealand Artificial Limb Service. Administered by Ministry of Social Development.
